args: for p in ./plugins/unica/scripts/run-bsl-reference.sh ./scripts/run-bsl-reference.sh; do if [ -x "$p" ]; then exec "$p"; fi; done; echo 'Unica bsl-analyzer reference launcher not found' >&2; exit 127
unica-bsl-reference.note: bsl-analyzer reference profile: platform syntax/help/search tools. Local stdio MCP runtime is shell-first on macOS/Linux and uses the pinned binary from the generated Unica package manifest.

args: for p in ./plugins/unica/scripts/run-bsl-workspace.sh ./scripts/run-bsl-workspace.sh; do if [ -x "$p" ]; then exec "$p"; fi; done; echo 'Unica bsl-analyzer workspace launcher not found' >&2; exit 127
unica-bsl-workspace.note: bsl-analyzer workspace profile: local 1C code, metadata, SDBL validation, and optional live tools. Local stdio MCP runtime is shell-first on macOS/Linux. Set UNICA_BSL_SOURCE_DIR to override the default current directory.

args: for p in ./plugins/unica/scripts/run-v8-runner-mcp.sh ./scripts/run-v8-runner-mcp.sh; do if [ -x "$p" ]; then exec "$p"; fi; done; echo 'Unica v8-runner launcher not found' >&2; exit 127
unica-v8-runner.note: v8-runner stdio MCP server. Local stdio MCP runtime is shell-first on macOS/Linux and uses the pinned binary from the generated Unica package manifest.

args: for p in ./plugins/unica/scripts/run-rlm-tools-bsl.sh ./scripts/run-rlm-tools-bsl.sh; do if [ -x "$p" ]; then exec "$p"; fi; done; echo 'Unica rlm-tools-bsl launcher not found' >&2; exit 127
unica-rlm-tools-bsl.note: rlm-tools-bsl stdio MCP server for token-efficient 1C BSL repository exploration. Local stdio MCP runtime is shell-first on macOS/Linux and uses the pinned executable from the generated Unica package manifest.

unica-v8std.note: Public v8std streamable HTTP MCP endpoint for 1C standards, APK codes, and v8-code-style knowledge.
